name: opencode-go
description: OpenCode Go - 基于 Electron + Vite + TypeScript 的桌面 AI 工作台

scripts.upload: echo "Upload release artifacts to your own distribution server"
scripts.start: vite build -c vite.main.config.ts && concurrently "vite -c vite.renderer.config.mts" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron ."
scripts.start:updater: vite build -c vite.main.config.ts && concurrently "vite -c vite.renderer.config.mts" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 UPDATER_DEV=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron ."
scripts.build: vite build -c vite.renderer.config.mts && vite build -c vite.main.config.ts
scripts.make: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.make:mac: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.make:win: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.make:all: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --win nsis --x64 --config electron-builder.config.js
